summary: Tested SSE text_delta streaming feature. Backend: All 6 tests passed - text_delta events emit correctly with token chunks, concatenation equals final ai_message.content. Frontend: StreamingBubble (data-testid='streaming-bubble') detected during message generation, shows progressive text with blinking cursor, disappears after done event. Tool activity events still show correctly during tool execution.

minor_warnings.issue: React key warning: 'Encountered two children with the same key'
minor_warnings.note: Non-breaking but should be fixed to avoid potential React rendering issues

passed_tests: Backend: SSE endpoint returns text/event-stream content-type
Backend: SSE stream emits text_delta events during LLM response
Backend: text_delta events have format {type: 'text_delta', content: '<chunk>'}
Backend: Concatenation of all text_delta content equals final ai_message.content
Backend: done event contains both user_message and ai_message
Backend: Tool events appear correctly when tools are called
Frontend: Text mode toggle (data-testid='mode-text-btn') works correctly
Frontend: Text input (data-testid='chat-input') accepts and sends messages
Frontend: StreamingBubble (data-testid='streaming-bubble') appears during text generation
Frontend: StreamingBubble shows progressive text content
Frontend: StreamingBubble has blinking cursor (animate-pulse element)
Frontend: After done event, StreamingBubble disappears and ChatBubble shows final message
Frontend: ToolActivityLive (data-testid='tool-activity-live') shows 'Thinking' status during processing
Frontend: Simple messages (no tools) stream text correctly
Frontend: Messages with tools also stream text correctly after tool execution
action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix React key warning - investigate duplicate keys in message rendering
seed_data_creation: Created test conversation (English-English) for streaming tests, auto-cleaned after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: SSE text_delta streaming fully implemented and tested. Key data-testids: 'streaming-bubble' (shows during text streaming with blinking cursor), 'tool-activity-live' (shows during tool execution), 'mode-text-btn' (switches to text input mode), 'chat-input' (text input field), 'send-message-btn' (send button). Event flow: thinking → [tool_start → tool_end]* → text_delta tokens → done. The StreamingBubble component shows progressive text with an animated cursor that disappears when streaming completes.

text_delta_streaming.concatenation_verified: Sum of all text_delta content = final ai_message.content

streaming_bubble_component.shows_when: sending=true AND streamingText is not empty
streaming_bubble_component.disappears_when: done event received, replaced by ChatBubble

tool_activity_during_streaming.shows_when: tools are being executed (before final text streaming)
tool_activity_during_streaming.event_flow: thinking → tool_start → tool_end → text_delta tokens → done

test_evidence.backend_curl_test: Verified text_delta events via curl - 91 tokens streamed, content matched final ai_message
test_evidence.frontend_playwright_test: StreamingBubble detected at check 6 with content length 2 (cursor + initial text)
